description_long: This object is a blue USB flash drive with a removable cap, featuring the Kingston brand logo prominently displayed on its top surface. The body is elongated and rounded at the ends, with a metallic USB connector exposed when the cap is removed. The cap itself is cylindrical and fits snugly over the connector to protect it from dust and damage. The main casing appears to be made of durable plastic, while the connector is metallic, likely aluminum or steel. The branding is printed on a white label inset into the top of the device, with a red and black logo. The overall design is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a pocket or attaching to a keychain.
description: A blue Kingston USB flash drive with a removable cap and metallic connector, featuring a white branded label on top. Compact, rounded, and portable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the USB connector exposed and the cap placed to the left, highlighting the device's slim profile.
description_view_1: Front view with the cap behind the connector, displaying the Kingston logo and the rounded end of the drive.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the cap to the right and the USB connector visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the cap in front and the back of the drive, with the logo visible along the top.
